2026-04-01T06:42:49.1963408Z ##[group]Run # Fix permissions on firewall logs so they can be uploaded as artifacts
2026-04-01T06:42:49.1963677Z [36;1m# Fix permissions on firewall logs so they can be uploaded as artifacts[0m
2026-04-01T06:42:49.1963817Z [36;1m# AWF runs with sudo, creating files owned by root[0m
2026-04-01T06:42:49.1964016Z [36;1msudo chmod -R a+r /tmp/gh-aw/sandbox/firewall/logs 2>/dev/null || true[0m
2026-04-01T06:42:49.1964343Z [36;1m# Only run awf logs summary if awf command exists (it may not be installed if workflow failed before install step)[0m
2026-04-01T06:42:49.1964453Z [36;1mif command -v awf &> /dev/null; then[0m
2026-04-01T06:42:49.1964590Z [36;1m  awf logs summary | tee -a "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"[0m
2026-04-01T06:42:49.1964667Z [36;1melse[0m
2026-04-01T06:42:49.1964842Z [36;1m  echo 'AWF binary not installed, skipping firewall log summary'[0m
2026-04-01T06:42:49.1964915Z [36;1mfi[0m
2026-04-01T06:42:49.1989971Z shell: /usr/bin/bash -e {0}
